title: poa pilcomayensis
intro: Poa pilcomayensis, also known as the Pilcomayo grass, is a species of grass native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and soothe irritated airways. Poa pilcomayensis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting its essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties.
